assertions.description: The power sub-sheet contains U301 (MCP1754ST-3302E/MB), a 3.3 V LDO regulator with +5V input and +3V3 output. When analyzed as a standalone sheet, signal_analysis.power_regulators is empty and all signal_analysis fields are empty. The regulator is only detected in the top-level candleLight.sch (multi-sheet parse). This is expected behavior — per-sub-sheet analysis misses regulators because the input/output nets (+5V, +3V3) are hierarchical labels that don't carry power context without the parent sheet. However, it means per-sheet outputs for sub-sheets are significantly incomplete for multi-sheet designs.
